description: Easy to begin using and very effective in calendaring/task management. Their Meeting Notetaker is pretty good as well.
author: Joe L.
pros: O loved the task manager the best - if you don't complete the task it will keep moving it forward on your calendar until you do. Period. Great feature.
cons: The cost is pretty steep, and it doesn't do as much as some other software, but overall, for its purpose, it's great.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Overall I have a positive experience working with Motion especially when working with teams. I feel more organized than ever before since using Motion.
author: Samantha B.
pros: I like how I can have multiple workspaces and projects set up all in one clear organized space. I like being able to see multiple different views and the filtering feature helps a lot. I love that it is well organized, and it is pleasing to look at. I love the colors and how they add to the overall organization.
cons: The AI feature does not work how I thought it would when I originally saw the advertisement for Motion and is a little more difficult to work with than I would like it to be.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Easy to use and get set up, and handled online client meeting notes and transcription the best. I really liked it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really loved the AI to help with managing my calendar and client meetings. The feed back on meetings was great. The cost ended up being higher then I want to pay right now, however it is incredibly easy to use.
cons: Cost is too high to bring on for my small business right now. If I could have only the features I want at a reduced cost, it'd be great for my team.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Motion has been a game-changer for me as a lawyer with ADHD. It helps prioritize what truly matters, reduces decision fatigue, and makes me far more productive and less stressed each day.
author: Hannah S.
pros: Motion keeps me on track by automatically organizing tasks and scheduling them. As an attorney with ADHD, this structure is invaluable for staying focused and reducing overwhelm.
cons: There’s a bit of a learning curve at first, and sometimes the auto-scheduling can feel rigid if I want more flexibility on short-notice changes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: From Chaos to Clarity: How Motion Transformed My Workflow
description: Simple, easy and it has changed my efficiency 10x. It hasn't completely removed all procrastination but at least now I have zero excuses because I can see what I need to do next.
author: Martin D.
pros: I love it. What a change it has made. I've adopted and learnt many systems and processes in the past from the all encompassing GTD Getting Things Done to managing multiple To Do lists but nothing is as useful and truly simple to use as Motion. The calendar updates, the priority of work, the simple view of what to do next and the project handling is everything I need. It's not as in depth or click-heavy as something like ClickUp but I found that if I missed a few updates things would spiral out of control and now it's a mentally big slog to put everything back. As Motion updates regardless, then this doesn't happen and it's simple to get back to now. So it passes the real-world usability test which means it's got longevity in it.
cons: The last update video from the MD had an annoying 'whoosh' sound which was too loud but the application I can't think of much. Perhaps adding a feature where I can choose to not be able to add a task without associating it to a project first - I notice I have a lot of tasks that should be in projects but that's just my bad management.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: AI-powered productivity tool that transforms task and time management
author: Andrea F.
pros: I love how it adapts to changing schedules, automatically reassigning tasks if meetings or unexpected events arise. The interface is clean and easy to navigate, even for users new to AI-based productivity tools. Motion uses AI-powered automations to dynamically schedule tasks based on priorities, deadlines, and your calendar availability. It integrates with tools like Google Calendar making it incredibly efficient for combined personal and professional use.
cons: It does not integrate with other task management tools. The learning curve is moderate, and it requires some tweaking to get the AI to align perfectly with individual preferences. The mobile app could use some improvement in features and navigation compared to the desktop version.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Motion is not what I thought it would be
description: I rarely used it because I felt it was cumbersome.
author: Patty M.
pros: I liked that it integrated with my calendars, especially since I have multiple calendars based on several work-related clients.
cons: Difficult to learn and was not user-friendly. Projects never got scheduled because it was non-intuitive. Expensive calendar.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: When starting motion, it took some time to get comfortable with its functionality. There's so much going on and so many options, It can be difficult to navigate alone. Luckily we always had support from the team. It made the process easier.
author: Ian L.
pros: Motion helps my team track our task, create projects, and set cohesive timelines. Most of our management is younger, so we tend to struggle with focusing for long periods of time. As with holding large amounts of information. Motion makes this process way simpler and helps compile necessary information.
cons: My only qualm with motion is some of the functions available on the website, are not available on my phone. I travel quite a bit, and there's a few things I'd like to do from my phone rather than needing to load up my laptop. It's honestly not that big of a deal. Motion is great.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: My overall experience was awesome. What usually would be my team and I writing our own notes (interrupting the flow of thoughts) became a continuous, awesome conversation.
author: Avery C.
pros: My team recently used Motion for a meeting with had with over 25 people. Notes were taken perfectly. Ideas were organized. And we have a perfect outline to send to all participants. Will use this in every meeting going forward!
cons: I wish this feature was actually built into our Microsoft meeting platform, but it is great nonetheless.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Motion is a great calendar app!
description: I used Motion to sync my apple, google, work and personal calendars all in one spot. This allows me to check one calendar for conflicts instead of 5.
author: Kitty S.
pros: The AI sorting function so tasks in the project works well. I'm always on top of my tasks. I like that I can change the priority level.
cons: It won't automatically sync with my MindBody Online Calendar. This is the only calendar that it won't draw info from automatically.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I have a great experience with motion. It's ai feature is really amazing.
author: Joshua O.
pros: Motion has great user-friendly interface and a lovely customer support. It's perfect for boosting productivity and streamlining your workflow.
cons: It's expensive with limited free version
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have ADHD so this app has helped me get the structure I needed to stop procrastinating or missing tasks.
author: Juliana G.
pros: I always stuggled with prioritizing work tasks / projects, so this app has helped me tremendously get that under control.
cons: The AI is not 100% as advertised but it is of great help to have that extra hand to suggest things
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Productivity and Task Management tool
description: Overall an amazing tool that lets you manage your tasks based on your own requirements. Integrates with calendar. Automatically organizes tasks based on urgency and priority
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The clean interface is very easy to navigate.
cons: More support options with other task management tool needs to be provided.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's pretty good, it is a task management app
author: Crystal S.
pros: I liked most is that it's an AI that helps you plan your work
cons: That you have to pay to use Motion, you can try the free version for like 7 days
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Michael L.
pros: It automatically moves my tasks when I don't complete them so that I don't forget them
cons: I wished it leveraged more AI to better prioritize my tasks. I am positive they are working on this.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Victoria S.
pros: The project management features are exactly what I've been looking for!
cons: Although Motion has a lot of automation features, some of the customisation is lacking
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A useful tool that is too expensive and can be replaced by free alternatives
description: Motion allowed me to quickly add tasks and meetings with a convenient set of options. However, Apple Calendar can do a similar job for free and I reverted to my good old Apple Calendar.
author: Lawrent M.
pros: I like how you can see your next tasks on the landing page. You can drag an item on the calendar, pretty much like Apple Calendar, which makes it very easy to create a new event. Just give it a name and you're good to go. You can go ahead and customize your task easily, choosing a priority and a deadline for it. A nice feature that Motion has is the ability to split your task into chunks, and give it a minimum chunk duration. When adding a flexible meeting, you can specify the type of meeting (Zoom, Google Meet, Phone number, Location), it is not unique to this app, but is a must-have feature for such app. All your tasks, past and current, are easily accessible via the Task menu. From there, it is easy to reorganize / reassign the tasks.
cons: I found it slower on Safari than on Chrome. When adding two tasks or a task and a meeting together, there is no reaction from Motion when I would expect a warning that two items happen at the same time... Sometimes prioritized tasks is a bit confusing. I've had issue with some prioritized tasks didn't show up in my calendar, but showed up in 'My Tasks". It may have been a bug.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The best scheduling application available but the cost is outrageous!
description: There is no doubt about it, Motion is an excellent application that will actually save you a considerable amount of time. Additionally, being told what to do (within set parameters) has really helped my efforts to get things done. Providing I note a task in Motion together with a due date, I can forget about it until it's time to work. The scheduling feature is also very well put together and I will use it for all external appointments.
author: Alec Anton S.
pros: I love the ability to quickly add a task, approximate duration and deadline within 10 seconds. I don't need to worry about clashing schedules or not having enough time during the day. I also really like the look of the application and found the introduction videos to be very helpful in navigating the app for the first time.
cons: I wish Motion didn't have to rely on a third-party calendar (Google or Outlook). Support tickets take 2 business days to get a response. For the price you would expect 24/7 assistance and a dedicated calendar.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I should have given in sooner
description: Couldn't be better. It was exactly what I was looking for and it pays for itself.
author: Andrew C.
pros: I've been getting Motion Ads for 2 years and it always intrigued me. I just never bought in before, but I'm glad I did eventually.It was exactly what I was looking for. I couldn't figure out a way to juggle all of the things I need to do while keeping them on my calendar at the same time. I live by my calendar so just that part alone is huge.It makes a huge daunting task list look visually possible to do. It is the closest you can get to the equivalent of an assistant organizing your calendar for you.
cons: I wish you could choose which calendar a task goes to instead of just having a default calendar for your tasks. You can do this with events, but I don't see how to do this with tasks.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This Software is the Key to my Sanity!
description: This has absolutely helped my work efficiency and time management!
author: Melissa D.
pros: The auto schedule feature is the best thing about Motion. It ensures that I’m not forgetting tasks around all of my meetings.
cons: I’d like there to be a bulk upload feature for tasks. Sometimes it’s easier to create in a spreadsheet than reproduce the same tasks for various clients over and over again.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I have realised that it helps me to visualise my deadlines better and I am able to better tackle the tasks ahead at the appropriate timing.
author: Yuxiang W.
pros: I love how it helps to input recurring tasks each week into the time slot that I had set.
cons: Something difficult to navigate at times were when I was on vacation or there was a public holiday. My usual settings applied so I had to just navigate on my own for the tasks I wanted to complete during that time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Saved so much time but it takes trust!!
description: It has definitely made me more productive and less stressed, but it is a journey to learn to trust that 'Motion' knows best. when you give in to it, it really does deliver what it promises, but I also manage it on a daily basis as priorities shift, but it gives me confidence that nothing will be forgotten or missed.
author: Pauline H.
pros: I like the fact that all my thoughts have been allotted time in the upcoming weeks, removing stress and procrastination. It enables me to remotely manage my team and their time also. I also like the calendar functionality that allows you to send various options of availability to people when trying to book a meeting.
cons: Sometimes I find the functionality is not intuitive and it took some time to learn how to use it properly. Support seems limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am very grateful for this tool and it has helped me recall and execute tasks that were previously in my head, notebooks, Notion, Google docs etc
author: Tremika M.
pros: I love how the auto-scheduling feature works to move things based on my other calendars and if I was able to complete the task preciously
cons: I wish there was more integration with notion to push and pull across databases
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very poor. Gave up on the platform after a month and tried to cancel and get a refund which was declined. OK, fair enough. But, then 11 months later they took the renewal and ignored every single follow-up email I made. This behavior means I am leaving my first 1-star software review.
author: Andy W.
pros: I wouldn't say I liked anything about this software, particularly if I compare it to other similar platforms. There is nothing superior about it.
cons: The interface. The UX. Everything is click-intensive and unintuitive. Equally bad, their support team is unresponsive.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Olivia B.
pros: I no longer have to manually schedule and move priorities around on my calendar. It is a game changer.
cons: It is missing some key slick features that solutions like Asana have - gaant charge for example.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
